title: Townsville, Queensland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Townsville is a city in Queensland with a population of 180,820. North Queensland’s tropical city with Magnetic Island, the Great Barrier Reef, and a large military presence.
